data.title: CoinMarketCap: The system is now back to full operation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CoinMarketCap posted on the X platform that its security team discovered a vulnerability related to the graffiti image displayed on the homepage. The graffiti image contains a link that triggers malicious code through an API call, causing unexpected pop-ups when some users visit the homepage. After discovering the vulnerability, the official deleted the problematic content, found the root cause, and took comprehensive measures to isolate and mitigate the problem. It can now be confirmed that all systems are now fully operational.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETF had a total net inflow of $6.3658 million yesterday, continuing its net inflow for 9 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (June 20, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$6.3658 million.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF IBIT, with a net inflow of US$46.912 million in a single day. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow has reached US$50.998 billion.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Fidelity ETF FBTC, with a net outflow of US$40.5462 million in a single day. Currently, FBTC's total net inflow has reached US$11.456 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$126.537 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to total Bitcoin market value) reached 6.14%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$46.656 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs had a total net outflow of $11.3444 million yesterday, with only BlackRock ETF ETHA experiencing a net outflow
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (June 20, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was $11.3444 million.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF ETH, with a single-day net inflow of $6.5992 million. The current total net inflow of ETH in history has reached $745 million.
The second is VanEck ETF ETHV, with a single-day net inflow of $1.7661 million. The current total net inflow of ETHV in history has reached $141 million.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF ETHA, with a single-day net outflow of $19.7096 million. The current total net inflow of ETHA in history has reached $5.284 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of the Ethereum spot ETF is US$9.605 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 3.28%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$3.895 billion.

data.title: Bitcoin May Surprise Bears: $100K–$110K Range Shows Rising Short Interest
data.description:
While Bitcoin (BTC) has remained range-bound – trading between $100,000 and $110,000 for about a month – both short and long positions have been building within this range, with short positions rising at a faster pace. Bitcoin Long Positions Slightly Ahead But Shorts Catching Up After reaching a new all-time high (ATH) of $111,814 last month, BTC has consolidated within the $100,000–$110,000 range for nearly a month, offering little clarity on its next directional move. Related Reading: Bitcoin Holds Strong Despite Israel-Iran Tensions – Weekly Resistance Begins To Crack According to a new CryptoQuant Quicktake post by contributor BorisVest, fresh data from Binance crypto exchange suggests that long positions currently hold a slight edge in this range. Historical data reveals a pattern – when short positions rise, short squeezes tend to follow
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-may-surprise-bears-100k-110k-range-shows-rising-short-interest/

data.title: U.S. Commerce Secretary Criticizes Federal Reserve's Interest Rate Policy
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, U.S. Commerce Secretary Lutnick expressed concerns on the X platform about the high interest rates in the United States, describing the country as the greatest in the world yet burdened with the highest rates among leading nations. He criticized the Federal Reserve Chair, suggesting that he is overly cautious.

Lutnick highlighted a troubling statement from Federal Reserve Chair Powell, who attributed price increases in certain product categories, such as personal computers, to tariffs. Lutnick pointed out that personal computers currently do not have tariffs, and any tariffs on semiconductors and computers will be announced after the Commerce Department completes its analysis.

He concluded by stating that these high interest rates are senseless.

data.title: Gate will launch STO Chain (STOC) spot trading and HODLer Airdrop
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate will launch STO Chain (STOC) spot trading at 15:00 (UTC+8) on June 30. The STOC HODLer Airdrop event is about to start and will end at 11:00 (UTC+8) on June 30. Hold 1 GT to receive the airdrop for free and share 492,611 STOC. The upper limit for individual participation is 2,000 GT.

data.title: Russia denies Musk seeks political asylum
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to foreign media reports, Russian State Duma Deputy Chairman Davankov said on the 20th local time that American billionaire Musk has applied for asylum in Russia. Subsequently, the Kremlin denied this statement. According to reports, Davankov said that the Russian Ministry of Foreign Affairs has received an application for political asylum to Musk. Russian Presidential Press Secretary Peskov said: "Why does Musk want to apply for asylum? This is a rumor, and no one has confirmed the news." The Russian Ministry of Foreign Affairs also criticized Davankov's remarks, saying that his remarks exceeded the bottom line of etiquette and were inappropriate for someone of his status. (Jin Shi)

data.title: Trend Research under Yi Lihua increased its holdings by 9,001 ETH, worth $22.72 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, Trend_Research, a secondary investment institution under the founder of LD Capital, Yi Lihua, bought another 9,001 ETH (US$22.72 million) after the decline last night. They continued to borrow 42.1 million USDT from Aave and transferred it to Binance after the decline, and then bought and withdrew 9,001 ETH. Now it should be buying and holding about 182,000 ETH, with a comprehensive cost of about US$2,250, and currently has a floating profit of about US$32.6 million.

data.title: US Biotech Company Aditxt Adds Digital Asset Financial Strategy to S-1 Registration Document
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news: American biotech company Aditxt, Inc. (ADTX) updated its S-1 registration document, which added "digital asset financial strategy". It is reported that Bitcoin is mentioned as many as 302 times in the document.

data.title: Aditxt, Inc. Incorporates Digital Asset Strategy in S-1 Filing
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. healthcare company Aditxt, Inc. (ADTX) has updated its S-1 registration document to include a 'digital asset financial strategy.' The filing mentions Bitcoin 302 times, indicating a significant focus on digital assets in the company's financial planning.

data.title: Labubu's price plummets in the second-hand market
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Affected by the official restocking, the price of Labubu in the second-hand market plummeted. Data from a certain trendy second-hand trading software showed that the recycling price of a whole box of Labubu3.0 dropped from 1,500 yuan to 2,800 yuan to 650 yuan to 800 yuan. Previously, some scalpers relied on order-grabbing software to stock up and sold at a premium of more than 10 times, but the official large-scale restocking broke the scarcity expectations and the market sold off. (Jinshi)

data.title: Belgravia Hartford increased its Bitcoin holdings through OTC, with its holdings rising to approximately 6.39 BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Belgravia Hartford, a Canadian listed company, announced that it has increased its holdings of 1.5316351 BTC through the over-the-counter trading desk. This is the company's second Bitcoin purchase transaction, and its total Bitcoin reserves have reached 6.39316479 so far. Earlier this month, Belgravia Hartford obtained a $5 million credit financing specifically for Bitcoin purchases, but this transaction used the company's own funds. (Businesswire)

data.title: Morgan Stanley: Offshore RMB stablecoin will verify the actual use case of cross-border settlement
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Morgan Stanley's latest research report pointed out that the relevant policies of the Hong Kong Stablecoin Act have essentially paved the first legal path for offshore RMB stablecoins. Supported by Hong Kong's deep offshore liquidity pool of about 1 trillion yuan, offshore RMB stablecoins will verify the actual use cases of cross-border settlements. The development of RMB stablecoins should be regarded as a potential component of cross-border RMB settlement infrastructure, including RMB swap agreements, CIPS (Cross-border RMB Interbank Payment System) and the global RMB clearing service network. (Ming Pao)

data.title: A whale deposited 3.77 million USDC to Hyperliquid and bought 107,865 HYPE
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale deposited 3.77 million USDC into Hyperliquid and bought 107,865 HYPEs at an average price of US$34.96.

data.title: A whale spent 10 million USDC to buy 4,170 ETH at an average price of $2,400
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale borrowed 10 million USDC from Aave four hours ago, and then bought 4,170 ETH at $2,400. The whale previously spent 86.79 million USDC on June 12 to buy 31,458 ETH at $2,759.

data.title: AI startup Cluely completes $15 million in financing, with a16z participating
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: AI startup Cluely announced the completion of a $15 million financing, with a16z participating in the investment. It is reported that Cluely is a company that develops artificial intelligence tools. Its core product is an undetectable AI assistant that can provide instant support in interviews, sales calls, meetings and other scenarios by monitoring the user's screen and audio in real time. (BusinessInsider)
